features: SWIRL FABRIC WHITENER: Restore brightness to dull fabrics with our effective fabric whitener for whites—perfect as a laundry whitener or shirt whitener for everyday and deep cleaning
POWERFUL CLOTHES WHITENER: Say goodbye to greying garments with this glowhite fabric whitener, specially formulated to revive white clothes and act as a reliable laundry bleach whitener
WHITENER FOR WHITE CLOTHES: Swirl’s washing whitener removes stains and yellowing from white fabrics, giving clothes a fresh, clean look every time you use it in your regular laundry cycle
EXPERT LAUNDRY WHITENER: Ideal for shirts, linens, and towels, this clothes whitener works as a fabric whitener for whites and laundry bleach—revitalising your wardrobe with every wash
FREE CHEEROO MAGNET: Each bundle includes 3x Swirl Fabric Whitener for Whites, a powerful laundry bleach whitener for brighter clothes—plus a cheerful free Cheeroo Magnet to brighten your day!
description: Bring brilliance back to your wardrobe with Swirl Fabric Whitener, the perfect solution for restoring the original whiteness of your clothes. Designed to tackle yellowing, dullness, and stubborn stains, this powerful whitener for white clothes works deep into the fabric to lift dirt and brighten whites with every wash. Whether you're freshening up shirts, towels, or everyday garments, Swirl acts as a dependable laundry bleach whitener that revitalises even the most tired fabrics. Its advanced formula makes it ideal as a shirt whitener or a general washing whitener, giving your laundry a crisp, clean finish. Safe for regular use, Swirl is a reliable clothes whitener that complements your usual detergent to deliver enhanced results. From delicates to household linens, this fabric whitener for whites keeps everything looking its best without harsh damage. Each application of Swirl transforms your washing routine into a professional-grade whitening experience. Whether you're using it weekly or for occasional boosts, this glowhite fabric whitener is a must-have in every laundry cupboard. Experience the difference with Swirl—your go-to laundry whitener for radiant, brilliant white clothes.
